scope: database tables diagram UI/UX for keyboard-first JavaFX desktop editor

revisionHistory.focus: Initial keyboard-first canvas, table/column/FK/join table, command palette, simple auto-layout.
Resolve Tab and bare-letter shortcut conflicts with F6 and Space command mode; current runtime supersedes F6 with direct 0/1/2/3 major-area focus.
Add table/column selection depth and derived relation semantics.
Add two-object workflow mark, FK edge selection, stricter Enter behavior.
Replace generic mark with Pin for relation and add compound-action previews.
Use context action bar, FK Source/Target chips, local Swap, safe repeat feedback.
Finalize single context line priorities, progressive Space command sheet, explicit Keep target pinned option.

majorAreaTraversal.previousDesign: v07 used F6/Shift+F6 cycling; replaced in runtime by direct 0/1/2/3 focus targets.

focusAndSelection.tabUsage: Only inside focused panel, dialog, picker, or command sheet.
focusAndSelection.canvasObjectNavigation: Arrow keys, selection depth, Enter to enter selected table columns, Esc to leave column depth.

spaceCommandSheet.open: Space on canvas when no editor/dialog is active

futureChords.Space G T: go_target / table-specific navigation after FK-edge picker is implemented
futureChords.FK edge picker: use a non-conflicting chord; Space E is reserved for edit selected

databaseDiagramModel.mvpVisualNotation: Simple table cards, PK/not-null/unique/FK/pin markers, directional FK lines; no crow foot notation.
databaseDiagramModel.joinTable: Created as one undoable compound action: table, two columns, composite PK/unique marker, two FK edges.

foreignKeyFlow.localSwapShortcut: X only while visible preview shows Swap

keepTargetPinned.purpose: Repeated FK creation without hidden repeat mode

safety.enterRule: Enter only performs a visible safe default action; ambiguous cases open an action menu.
safety.destructiveActions: Require confirmation when bulk or relation-affecting.

openRisks: Progressive command sheet adds UI complexity and needs onboarding.
Keep target pinned must stay default off.
Single context line priority must be implemented deterministically.
Selected, pinned, FK direction and Source/Target roles must be visually clear.
Selection depth and relation pin require F1/help onboarding.
FK inference and type mismatch warnings must be transparent.

databaseImportScope.mvpAllowed: PostgreSQL metadata import from a live connection for tables, columns, single-column FK metadata, and PK metadata including composite PK as table-level constraints.
databaseImportScope.excluded: SQL DDL text import/export, generic DB vendor support, SQL parsing, DDL export, merge import, and full grouped/composite foreign-key model/import.
databaseImportScope.replacePolicy: Repeated import replaces the whole selected DB diagram.

compositeKeyPolicy.compositePrimaryKeys: import as deterministic table-level COMPOSITE_PRIMARY_KEY constraints
compositeKeyPolicy.compositeForeignKeys: skip with import warning in MVP; do not split into misleading per-column FK edges
